raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.3, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.3": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.3, "R1.5": 0.3, "R1.6": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 1.0, "RX.2": 1.0, "RX.3": 1.0, "RX.4": 1.0, "RX.5": 1.0}, "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "rationale": {"R1.2": "The section makes several inter-dependent technical claims (meta-gradient updating B through k=5 inner steps, gradient-balancing from Wang et al., residual-adaptive sampling) whose logical coherence and internal consistency must be checked regardless of the help type.", "R1.3": "Six distinct citations (Krishnapriyan 2021, Wang/Yu/Perdikaris 2022, Rahaman 2019, Tancik 2020, Wang 2021, Wu 2023) are invoked to motivate specific design choices; verifying that each claim accurately characterizes the cited work is central to any substantive assistance.", "R1.6": "'Help me with this section' is a canonical prose-improvement framing; sentence-level and paragraph-level quality is a plausible primary target.", "R1.7": "The related-work paragraph attributes six specific findings to specific papers; reference accuracy and attribution correctness are directly at stake."}, "clarification_needed": true, "clarification_question": "Is your primary goal (a) improving the prose clarity, flow, and readability of this section, or (b) verifying the technical and logical correctness of the claims, math, and citations?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section makes several inter-dependent technical claims (meta-gradient updating B through k=5 inner steps, gradient-balancing from Wang et al., residual-adaptive sampling) whose logical coherence and internal consistency must be checked regardless of the help type.
rationale.R1.3: Six distinct citations (Krishnapriyan 2021, Wang/Yu/Perdikaris 2022, Rahaman 2019, Tancik 2020, Wang 2021, Wu 2023) are invoked to motivate specific design choices; verifying that each claim accurately characterizes the cited work is central to any substantive assistance.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' is a canonical prose-improvement framing; sentence-level and paragraph-level quality is a plausible primary target.
rationale.R1.7: The related-work paragraph attributes six specific findings to specific papers; reference accuracy and attribution correctness are directly at stake.
